scopeNote: Round 3 reran milestone validators on current HEAD, auto-fixed a small Spotless drift, re-reviewed the two previously failing features against their latest fixes, and all four scrutiny reviews now pass with no remaining blocking issues.

appliedUpdates.description: Applied Spotless auto-formatting after the round-3 lint check reported formatting drift in the non-active dealer credit-limit request regression proof.
Applied Spotless auto-formatting after the round-3 lint check reported formatting drift in the dealer hybrid replay completeness fix path.

Refreshed the failed shared-dealer scrutiny review against current HEAD; the follow-up fix now passes and confirms non-active dealer sessions are denied on `/api/v1/credit/limit-requests` while finance reads stay available.
Refreshed the failed dealer-receipt scrutiny review against current HEAD; the follow-up fix now passes and confirms hybrid subset-loss replay states fail closed.
Documented that Maven commands are cwd-sensitive because `erp-domain/.mvn/settings.xml` resolves relative to `erp-domain/`.
Documented that non-active dealer finance-read-only validation must inventory dealer-capable routes outside `/api/v1/dealer-portal/**`, including `/api/v1/credit/limit-requests`.
Archived the prior round-2 scrutiny synthesis before publishing the round-3 synthesis.
Recorded the round-3 validator outcomes and pass synthesis for the milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For payment-event and allocation packets with hybrid or multi-allocation receipts, add an explicit checklist item requiring degraded replay proof for both all-rows-missing and subset-rows-surviving allocation loss states.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 scrutiny failed because the packet only proved the all-rows-missing case. The round-3 pass required a focused follow-up fix and regression that covered the subset-loss hybrid receipt replay case.
